title: The wealth identity embodiment
subtitle: A closing ritual for anchoring the wealthy, wise version of yourself as a present reality rather than a future aspiration.
excerpt: A ritual from Week 4 of The Money Journal. Use at the end of a week of identity work to anchor the shift, to let the current self and the wealthy self merge rather than remain separate.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Week 4 Ritual of The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798276631448). Aligned with Day 28 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

content.text: A closing ritual from Week 4 of The Money Journal. The ritual has five stages: prepare, release, allow, integrate, anchor. The aim is to let the current self and the wealthy, wise self become one, not by waiting for external proof of wealth, but by choosing the identity now.
Sit quietly. Take a few slow, deep breaths. Imagine yourself six months from now: confident, abundant, and settled in yourself. Hold that image clearly.
I am ready to release all doubt, fear, and resistance to seeing myself as wealthy and wise. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow the wealthy, confident, generous version of me to fully emerge. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.

Take one slow, full breath in. Let it all the way out. As you exhale, let any remaining tension release. Visualise your current self and that future version merging: same posture, same steadiness, same power. The identity becomes one.
Write this sentence in your own handwriting. Say it out loud. Feel it in your body.
This week, I am grateful that wealth and wisdom now feel natural and familiar to me.
Adapted from the Week 4 Ritual of The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025). Aligned with Day 28 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
